issues.message: Raw digits are not allowed in prose blocks in v2. Use numeric placeholders like {{N1}} and back them with numeric_facts + numeric_refs.
issues.fix: Move the number into numeric_facts (with value/unit/period/source/accessed_at). Replace the digits in text with {{N#}} and include N# in numeric_refs.

issues.message: Numeric fact N2 is never referenced (numeric_refs).
issues.fix: Either reference it from a section/exhibit via numeric_refs or remove it.
